# Whoza.ai — Full Documentation

> AI call answering service built in Scotland for UK tradespeople. Katie — an AI voice agent — answers business calls 24/7, qualifies leads, books jobs, and sends instant WhatsApp alerts. Plans from £59/month. 7-day free trial. ICO-registered, UK GDPR compliant, SOC 2 Type II certified. 4.9/5 from 47 verified reviews.

Company: WHOZA AI LTD, 6 Atholl Crescent, Perth, Scotland PH1 5JN. Founded 2025 by Dru Shannon. 5-10 employees. Serves UK tradespeople in England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.

## How the Service Works

Katie is an AI voice agent that answers incoming calls for trade businesses. The process works as follows:

1. **Connect your number** — Forward your existing business phone to whoza.ai (takes 30 seconds). No new number needed.
2. **Record your greeting** — Record a custom greeting in your own voice, or use the UK-accented default. The greeting includes your business name and a professional welcome message.
3. **Set your calendar** — Connect Google Calendar or Microsoft Outlook. Katie checks real-time availability before offering appointment slots to callers.
4. **Go live** — Katie answers calls 24/7. When a customer calls, Katie: answers with your custom greeting, asks qualifying questions (job type, urgency, location), checks your calendar for availability, offers appointment slots, captures the caller's name, phone number, and job details, sends a structured WhatsApp message to you within 3-5 seconds.

**What the tradesperson receives on WhatsApp:**
- Caller name and phone number
- Job type and description
- Urgency level (emergency / this week / non-urgent)
- Location/postcode
- Suggested appointment slots based on calendar availability
- One-tap options to: call back, text back, confirm booking, or mark as non-urgent

**What the caller experiences:**
- Professional UK-accented voice answering in the business name
- Natural conversation (not robotic)
- Clear questions about their needs
- Immediate appointment slot suggestions
- Confirmation that their details have been sent to the tradesperson

## Pricing Plans

| Plan | Price | Features |
|------|-------|----------|
| Starter | £59/month | 50 calls/month, WhatsApp delivery, basic greeting, 9am-5pm answering |
| Growth | £125/month | Unlimited calls, WhatsApp delivery, custom greeting, 24/7 answering, calendar integration |
| Pro | £230/month | Everything in Growth plus: priority support, call recording, CRM integration, custom questions |
| Scale | £399/month | Everything in Pro plus: multiple numbers, team accounts, analytics dashboard, dedicated account manager |

All plans include: 7-day free trial (no credit card), 30-day money-back guarantee, unlimited WhatsApp messages, UK-based support, and free setup assistance.

## Core Features

- **24/7 answering** — Nights, weekends, bank holidays. Never miss a call.
- **WhatsApp delivery** — Instant structured messages with caller details. Tap to call back, text, or book.
- **Calendar integration** — Real-time availability checking against Google Calendar or Outlook.
- **Custom greeting** — Record your own voice or use the professional UK-accented default.
- **Lead qualification** — Katie asks job-type, urgency, and location questions to prioritise leads.
- **Call recording** — Available on Pro and Scale plans. Listen back to calls for quality assurance.
- **CRM integration** — Connect to popular trade CRMs (Pro/Scale plans).
- **No new number needed** — Forward your existing business phone.
- **30-second setup** — Phone forwarding takes 30 seconds. Full setup in 30 minutes.

## Service Areas

Katie is optimised for the following UK trade categories with industry-specific question scripts:

**Emergency trades** (24/7 critical): Plumbers (burst pipes, boiler breakdowns), Electricians (emergency callouts), Gas Engineers (carbon monoxide, gas leaks), Locksmiths (lockouts, break-ins), Heating Engineers (no heating/hot water emergencies), Drainage Engineers (floods, sewage backups).

**Planned trades**: Builders (extensions, renovations, new builds), Roofers (repairs, replacements, guttering), Carpenters (bespoke furniture, kitchens, renovations), Painters & Decorators (interior, exterior, commercial), Cleaners (domestic, commercial, end-of-tenancy), Handymen (general repairs, maintenance), Landscapers (design, maintenance, patios, decking), Plasterers (skimming, rendering, dry lining), Tilers (bathrooms, kitchens, floors, commercial), Joiners (bespoke joinery, staircases, kitchens), Pest Control (rodents, insects, commercial contracts).

**Cities served**: Birmingham, Bristol, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Leeds, Liverpool, London, Manchester — plus full nationwide coverage via phone forwarding.

## UGC Customer Stories

**Gary the Plumber** (Manchester): "I was missing 5 emergency calls a week. In the first month with whoza.ai, Katie captured 47 calls. I recovered £6,800 in lost revenue. The WhatsApp messages come through so fast I can call back within 2 minutes."

**Dave the Electrician** (Leeds): "3 emergency callouts a day were going to voicemail. whoza.ai fixed it in 30 minutes. £4,200 recovered in 3 weeks. Best business decision I've made this year."

**Sarah the Locksmith** (Birmingham): "3am lockout calls were going to voicemail. Katie captures every one now. I don't even hear the phone ring — just the WhatsApp ping with the customer's details."

**Charlie the Heating Engineer** (Glasgow): "Lost £12,000 in one winter to missed boiler calls. Katie's winter diary showed 47 missed calls in 4 weeks. AI answering recovered £8,400 in the following month."

**Tom the Roofer** (Bristol): "Lost an £8,000 roof job because I was up a ladder and missed the call. Never happens now. Katie answers while I'm working at height."
